# hetzner_vswitch (Resource)

Manages a Hetzner vSwitch for Layer 2 networking between dedicated servers.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hetzner_vswitch" "example" {
  name = "my-vswitch"
  vlan = 4010
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the vSwitch.
- `vlan` (Number) The VLAN ID (4000-4091).

### Read-Only

- `cancelled` (Boolean) Whether the vSwitch has been cancelled.
- `id` (Number) The unique ID of the vSwitch.
